name: Ahmed Aboyousef
profile: First-year Computer Science student at Lancaster University Leipzig, interested in front-end development and practical web technologies. I enjoy building clean websites and learning tools like Git, Bash, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projects.name: CV Portfolio Website
projects.description: Built a multi-page portfolio site with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features a theme toggle, Bash script for HTML analysis, and is version-controlled with Git on GitHub.
